===Format===
* '''iQOO India League 2024''' : ''Febraury 22nd - 24th
** 16 teams.
*** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 14}} teams from [[IQOO Pro Series/2024|Pro Series 2024]].
*** {{team|team soul}} invited as partnered team.
*** {{team|godlike esports}} as Champion of [[IQOO Pro Series/2023|Pro Series 2023]].
** 3 matchdays, 18 matches.
